---
title: "Teaching"
toc: true
---

## Teaching Experience

### Independent Instructor — University Admission Preparation (Bangladesh)

- Taught **300+ students** over ~5 years, preparing them for highly competitive undergraduate admission exams (e.g., BUET and other top universities).
- Covered core subjects including **Mathematics and Physics**.
- Designed structured lessons, practice problems, and exam strategies tailored to competitive testing environments.
- Mentored students individually to strengthen conceptual understanding and performance under time constraints.
- Students successfully admitted to top institutions including BUET and other leading universities in Bangladesh.

---

## Mentoring

- Provided one-on-one academic guidance to students on:
  - problem-solving strategies  
  - exam preparation techniques  
  - building strong fundamentals in quantitative subjects  

---

## Teaching Interests

- Algorithms and Problem Solving  
- Systems and Computer Science Fundamentals  
- Computer Security  
- High-Performance Computing  

---

## Academic Opportunities

- Offered **Lecturer positions** at:
  - Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET)  
  - United International University (UIU)  
- Chose to pursue PhD research instead.
